name: Regulatory Compliance Verification
question: Can the operator prove to the regulator — with externally verifiable evidence — that its coverage and quality obligations are being met?
ifAbsent: Coverage obligations are self-reported using internal data. Regulators cannot independently verify claims. Fine risk is elevated. License renewal is based on unverified assertions.
atL4: Regulatory evidence is generated continuously and automatically. Compliance reports are produced in real time rather than retrospectively, enabling proactive engagement with regulators rather than reactive defence.
